summary: Intel enforcement events roughly quadrupled between Fiscal 2022 and Fiscal 2024 as DOP's Intelligence Unit expanded collaboration with case-carrying probation officers, then fell 31% in Fiscal 2025 — a decline DOP attributes largely to an 87% drop in ignition-interlock-device compliance checks (tied to fewer court referrals for those devices), even as weapon-possession and domestic-incident enforcement visits both rose that year.
